title: Reusable Skill Frontmatter
description: Standardized schema for SKILL.md files that can be shared across extensions and projects

name.description: Unique skill identifier (use kebab-case, prefix with ck: or project: if needed)

description.description: Concise one-sentence description of what the skill does and its value

when_to_use.description: When Claude should automatically invoke or recommend this skill

user-invocable.description: Must be true so users and other extensions can explicitly call it

argument-hint.description: Short usage hint shown to users, e.g. '[task description] [--flag]'

keywords.description: Search keywords for discovery by other extensions

license.description: SPDX or short license name (MIT recommended for reusability)
